properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: E’re you left your room this morning, Did you think to pray, In the Name of Christ our Saviour, Did you ask for loving favour as a shield today.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh how praying rests the weary, Prayer will change the night today, So when life seems dark and dreary, Don’t forget to pray.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When you met with great temptation, Did you think to pray, By His dying love and merit Did you claim the Holy Spirit as your guide and stay.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When your heart was filled with anger Did you think to pray, Did you plead for grace my brother That you might forgive another Who has crossed your way.
